params.name: Nuclear Football
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On May 9, 1980, the American President carried this suitcase for the first time. It was to ensure the country's nuclear safety.

This suitcase of the American President is 10 cm thick and weighs 10 kg. It is equipped with shockproof and anti-interference capabilities, as well as an auto-protection device and a strong password lock. It can only be opened by those who know the password. When the president travels within the country or abroad, a special bodyguard can be seen carrying this suitcase. …
